'''thatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irregularly|irregularly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irregularly|irregularly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thatate|thatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thatatesher|thatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatatesherĂ«m|thatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thatatero|thatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thatateshĂ«|thatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatateshĂ«m|thatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithatatero|gokithatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithatateshĂ«|gokithatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatateshĂ«m|gokithatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothatankerom|gothatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothatankeshĂ«|gothatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatankeshĂ«m|gothatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothatankeya|gothatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thataterom|thataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatatemu|thatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thatateya|thatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithataterom|gokithataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatatemu|gokithatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithatateya|gokithatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thatatate|thatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thatatatesher|thatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatatatesherĂ«m|thatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thatatatero|thatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thatatateshĂ«|thatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatatateshĂ«m|thatatateshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithatatateshĂ«|gokithatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatatateshĂ«m|gokithatatateshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothatatankeshĂ«|gothatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatatankeshĂ«m|gothatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothatatankeya|gothatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thatataterom|thatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thatatatemu|thatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thatatateya|thatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithatataterom|gokithatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithatatatemu|gokithatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithatatateya|gokithatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠte|thĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠtesher|thĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠtero|thĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠtĂŠtero|gokithĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠtĂŠteya|thĂŠtĂŠteya]]

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠtĂŠteya|gokithĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thaftafte|thaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thaftaftesher|thaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaftaftesherĂ«m|thaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaftaftero|thaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thaftafteshĂ«|thaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaftafteshĂ«m|thaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaftaftero|gokithaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithaftafteshĂ«|gokithaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaftafteshĂ«m|gokithaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothaftafnkerom|gothaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothaftafnkeshĂ«|gothaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothaftafnkeshĂ«m|gothaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothaftafnkeya|gothaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaftafterom|thaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaftaftemu|thaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thaftafteya|thaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaftafterom|gokithaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaftaftemu|gokithaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithaftafteya|gokithaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
